title: fix: align tinybird read tokens and soften churn timeout
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tuning the birdhouse
gist.blurb: Aligned our internal Tinybird analytics tokens and smoothed out some dashboard timeouts. The data keeps flowing!
gist.summary: Aligned Tinybird read tokens across internal services and added soft-fail handling for KPI dashboard timeouts.
gist.impact: Internal analytics and KPI dashboards will load more reliably without failing on slow queries.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel bird (representing Tinybird analytics) and the bee mascot organizing shiny keys (tokens) in front of a glowing dashboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a tiny blue pixel bird organizing shiny golden keys on a wooden desk. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a glowing lime green (#ecf874) analytics dashboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
